emails.subject: RE: Re: Chris Germany's PC
emails.body: RE: Re: Chris Germany's PC My power cord came in for my spare pc. Would you be able to hook it up? I'm leaving today around 1:30 ish. Thanks

emails.subject: RE: Re: Chris Germany's PC
emails.body: Chris, I'm right in the middle of imaging a PC. Please leave your power supply under your desk and I will come by around 2:30 and complete the install. Also, do you have any info on your Arm's request. thanks, dalton ext. 3-0356 To: Hogan, Dalton

emails.subject: RE: Re: Chris Germany's PC
emails.body: Not yet. Thanks for your help. To: Germany, Chris
